title: Auto Rocket+
description:
This project has been archived due to low downloads and no motivation to continue updating.

Auto Rocket+ automatically equips fireworks while flying with an Elytra and restores your previous offhand item when you land. Toggle it anytime with R.
body:
# 🚀 Auto Rocket+

**Auto Rocket+** is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod that automatically equips fireworks while you’re flying with an Elytra — and restores your previous offhand item once you land.

Smooth flight. Zero micromanagement.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🚀 **Auto Firework Usage**  
  Automatically equips fireworks while Elytra flying.

- 🖐️ **Offhand Restore**  
  Your previous offhand item is restored once you touch the ground.

- ⌨️ **Toggle Anytime**  
  Press **R** to enable or disable Auto Rocket+.

- 🧠 **Smart Detection**  
  Only activates while Elytra flying — no wasted rockets.

- ⚙️ **Mod Menu Support**  
  Configure the mod easily through Mod Menu.

- 🧩 **Client-side Only**  
  Works on any server. No installation required server-side.

---

## 🕹️ Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| **R** | Toggle Auto Rocket+ on/off |

---

## ⚠️ Notes

- This mod does **not** fire rockets automatically — it equips them so you can boost naturally.
- Works best with Elytra equipped in the chest slot.
- Fully safe for multiplayer (client-side only).

---
